meta.question: In this model, will the choreography always reach an end node? (Model ID: 2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc)

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?choreo ?choreoName ?defs WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:normalizedId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  OPTIONAL { ?choreo bbo:name ?choreoName . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?choreo ?choreoName ?defs WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?defs a bboExt:Definitions .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  OPTIONAL { ?choreo bbo:name ?choreoName . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?start ?startName WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?start a bboExt:StartEvent .
  ?start tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  OPTIONAL { ?start bbo:name ?startName . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?end ?endName WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?end a bboExt:EndEvent .
  ?end tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  OPTIONAL { ?end bbo:name ?endName . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?node ?nodeName ?type WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?node tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?node a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ChoreographyTask, bboExt:StartEvent, bboExt:EndEvent, bboExt:ExclusiveGateway, bboExt:ParallelGateway, bboExt:IntermediateCatchEvent))
  OPTIONAL { ?node bbo:name ?nodeName . }
}
LIMIT 50

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flow ?sourceName ?targetName WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?flow a bbo:SequenceFlow .
  ?flow tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?flow bbo:has_sourceRef ?source .
  ?flow bbo:has_targetRef ?target .
  ?source bbo:name ?sourceName .
  ?target bbo:name ?targetName .
}
LIMIT 50

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gw ?gwName ?dir WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?gw a bboExt:ExclusiveGateway .
  ?gw tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  OPTIONAL { ?gw bbo:name ?gwName . }
  OPTIONAL { ?gw bboExt:gatewayDirection ?dir . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?node ?nodeName ?type WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?node tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?node a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ChoreographyTask, bboExt:StartEvent, bboExt:ExclusiveGateway, bboExt:ParallelGateway, bboExt:IntermediateCatchEvent))
  OPTIONAL { ?node bbo:name ?nodeName . }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?flow a bbo:SequenceFlow .
    ?flow bbo:has_sourceRef ?node .
  }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reachable ?name WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?start a bboExt:StartEvent .
  ?start tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?start ((^bbo:has_sourceRef)/bbo:has_targetRef)+ ?reachable .
  OPTIONAL { ?reachable bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 50

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?end ?endName WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?start a bboExt:StartEvent .
  ?start tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?end a bboExt:EndEvent .
  ?end tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?end bbo:name ?endName .
  ?start ((^bbo:has_sourceRef)/bbo:has_targetRef)+ ?end .
}
LIMIT 10

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?node ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?start a bboExt:StartEvent .
  ?start tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?node a ?type .
  ?node tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ChoreographyTask, bboExt:ExclusiveGateway, bboExt:ParallelGateway, bboExt:IntermediateCatchEvent))
  OPTIONAL { ?node bbo:name ?name . }
  ?start ((^bbo:has_sourceRef)/bbo:has_targetRef)+ ?node .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?node ((^bbo:has_sourceRef)/bbo:has_targetRef)+ ?end .
    ?end a bboExt:EndEvent .
    ?end tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?node ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?node a ?type .
  ?node tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ChoreographyTask, bboExt:ExclusiveGateway, bboExt:ParallelGateway, bboExt:IntermediateCatchEvent, bboExt:StartEvent))
  OPTIONAL { ?node bbo:name ?name . }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?flow a bbo:SequenceFlow .
    ?flow bbo:has_sourceRef ?node .
  }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?node ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc" .
  ?node a ?type .
  ?node tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ChoreographyTask, bboExt:ExclusiveGateway, bboExt:ParallelGateway, bboExt:IntermediateCatchEvent, bboExt:StartEvent))
  OPTIONAL { ?node bbo:name ?name . }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?start a bboExt:StartEvent .
    ?start tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
    ?start ((^bbo:has_sourceRef)/bbo:has_targetRef)+ ?node .
  }
}
LIMIT 25
